title: Italian Crispy Lasagna Casserole
description: A classic lasagna recipe with a crunchy twist, featuring crispy breadcrumbs and parmesan on top. This dish is perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Cook the lasagna sheets according to package instructions.
In a bowl, combine ricotta cheese and cooked rice.
In a separate bowl, spread a layer of the cheese and rice mixture on the bottom of a baking dish.
Arrange 4 cooked lasagna sheets on top of the cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers of cheese mixture and lasagna sheets one more time.
Sprinkle breadcrumbs on top and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
